data.body:
if you look at the history/conversation logs from 44f1, 8:57:45AM this morning (3/31/26) you can see that Prompt 11, Take 11, Debug target: term-1774873034101-2p7pxo
says that it's using CODEX GPT-5.4 5.4

this was pretty clearly an openrouter model, you can see the metadata in the response.

    "id": "prt_d42af1bc8001mEC6Yao5hJ6q7F",
    "sessionID": "ses_2bd50fd1affe90pf9TPxctTv1W",
    "messageID": "msg_d42af031b001E9LrZkGS9Wy7jp",
data.title: History Screen: Wrong Agent displayed
